title: Download Offline Installer
description: Download offline installers through SAK tooling first, capture source paths and checksums, and verify usable artifacts.
starter_prompt: Download an offline installer for the requested application. Use SAK offline downloader first.

phases.prompt: Confirm app name, edition, architecture, and offline use case if missing.
Search the built-in SAK offline downloader/package catalog before any external source research.
phases.completion: Built-in package candidates are captured or ambiguity is reported.

phases.prompt: Download primary installer binaries using built-in offline downloader.
phases.completion: Installer artifacts are saved with paths and hashes.

phases.prompt: Find official vendor offline installer sources and checksum guidance.
phases.completion: Official fallback sources are identified or unavailable.

phases.prompt: Verify downloaded artifact paths, sizes, package/source identity, and checksum availability before reporting.
phases.completion: Download artifacts are verified or gaps are listed.

phases.prompt: Create a technician-readable download report with evidence, user request, package/source selection, actions/tools used, file paths, sizes, hashes, verification status, artifacts, cleanup status, residual risk, and follow-up.
phases.completion: User knows what was downloaded and where.

phases.prompt: Remove temp extraction folders, keep requested installer artifacts.

acceptance_criteria: SAK offline downloader was tried before external source research.
Artifacts include path, size, and SHA-256 when available.
Any alternate source is official or clearly marked as not official.
Final response states exact artifact location.
